title: Commodity Channel Index (CCI) Zero Line EA
subtitle: Dual-CCI (25/50) Zero Crossover with EMA(34) Trend Filter — 77% Win Rate on USDJPY H1
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: MEDIUM EXTRACT — dual-period CCI zero-line crossover as momentum gate, EMA(34) as trend filter, ATR×1.5 SL with RRR=1.5 validated by 77% win rate on USDJPY. CCI as alternative to ADX for momentum detection.

core_concept.name: Dual CCI Zero Line Cross
core_concept.description: CCI(50) crosses above zero (longer-term trend shift) + CCI(25) above zero (short-term momentum) + close above EMA(34) = BUY. All three simultaneously on a new bar. 77% win rate on USDJPY H1 in backtest (13 signals, 10 wins).
core_concept.cci_formula: CCI = (TypicalPrice - SMA(TP, period)) / (0.015 * MeanDeviation(TP, period)); TypicalPrice = (H+L+C)/3
core_concept.zero_line_logic: CCI above zero = price above its statistical average = bullish momentum. CCI(50) crossing zero = structural momentum shift. CCI(25) above zero = recent confirmation.
core_concept.relevance_to_creviaderiv: CCI zero-line cross is an alternative ADX rising gate. ADX measures trend strength; CCI measures deviation from mean. CCI captures overbought/oversold context that ADX misses. Could use CCI as supplemental momentum gate.

signal_logic.buy: CCI_25 > 0 AND CCI_50 crosses above 0 (prev < 0, curr > 0) AND close > EMA_34
signal_logic.sell: CCI_25 < 0 AND CCI_50 crosses below 0 (prev > 0, curr < 0) AND close < EMA_34

RiskRewardRatio.description: TP = SL × 1.5 — aligns with our MIN_RRR=1.5

backtesting.note: Small sample. 13 signals over 6 months. RRR=1.5 configured.

keep: Dual-period CCI: slow CCI(50) for trend shift, fast CCI(25) for confirmation
Zero-line crossover as trigger (not overbought/oversold levels)
discard: CCI as primary entry indicator — use as supplement to existing ADX gate
EMA(34) filter — use our market_structure and EMA3
improve: CCI(14) on M1 as supplemental momentum gate alongside ADX: ADX rising AND CCI(14) > 0 = double momentum confirmation
CCI zero cross on M15 as trend shift detector (alternative to our CHOCH detection)
CCI for divergence: simpler than RSI divergence, same concept

cci_formula_python.code: tp = (high + low + close) / 3; sma_tp = tp.rolling(period).mean(); mad = tp.rolling(period).apply(lambda x: abs(x - x.mean()).mean()); cci = (tp - sma_tp) / (0.015 * mad)
